All FAQ Questions
Are tea bags worse than loose herbal tea?How do I choose herbal tea bags for daily use?What makes herbal tea bags feel gift ready?
Do herbal tea bags have medical effects?What should I check on a caffeine-free tea label?Why does ingredient order matter on herbal tea bags?
Can affiliate links be added later?Should product pages use real product images later?How should affiliate herbal tea products be compared?
Products and Links

How should affiliate herbal tea products be compared?

Compare use case, ingredients, caffeine wording, packaging, serving count, and merchant clarity.

DirectoryCompare practical buying factorsAvoid overclaiming

Compare practical buying factors

Affiliate product comparison should focus on factors the reader can verify: use case, flavor family, caffeine wording, ingredient transparency, sachet wrapping, serving count, and gift suitability.

Avoid overclaiming

A comparison page should not make medical promises. It should help readers choose a suitable product and clearly mark merchant or affiliate links when they are added.
